docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SIMPSON, KANDACE YOUNG AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $75.00 SERVED AUG-14-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-05-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF KANDACE YOUNG SIMPSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMPSON, KANDACE YOUNG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE COMPANY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,625.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 09/18/2025. SC-130 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF. (RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
